message:
fix: thread visited map through all resolution paths to prevent cycle bypass (gt-64wh5)

resolveMemberWithVisited fell back to r.Resolve() for @-prefixed and
/-containing members, creating a fresh visited map that lost cycle detection.
Groups referencing each other via @-patterns could cause infinite recursion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
